channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Jack Harlow Announces New Dates for “Monica Tour”
item.description: 🌟 Let's dance with Jack Harlow! 🎶✨ New dates for the "Monica Tour" are here! 🎉 #JackHarlow #MonicaTour

item.title: Overmono announce fall tour dates
item.description: 🎉 Pumped to catch @overmono on their upcoming fall tour! Which city will you be dancing in? 🕺💃 #LiveMusic #OvermonoOnTour

item.title: Watch Hayley Williams bring out Jenny Lewis, Julien Baker, join American Football at Kilby & more
item.description: 🌟 Hayley Williams surprises fans with epic collabs at Kilby show! Watch the magic unfold! 🎶 #HayleyWilliams #MusicCollabs

item.title: Wild Pink Announce New Album Still Coming Down Via Fan Mailers
item.description: 💌✨ Wild Pink surprises fans with upcoming album delivered straight to mailboxes! Let the music magic unfold! 🎶💌 #WildPink #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Mitski Addresses Fan Enthusiasm For “6-7” Lyric
item.description: 🎶 Mitski dives into the deep end with fans on “6-7” lyric speculation! 🤔 What's your take on this musical mystery? #Mitski #MusicNews 🎵
